## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Specification update (includes spec version change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Specification impact
If this affects the AgentSpec specification:
- [ ] This is a specification update
- [ ] Specification version bump required
- [ ] New version: (e.g., 0.2.0)
- [ ] Backwards compatible: [ ] Yes [ ] No
- [ ] Migration guide included: [ ] Yes [ ] N/A

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated

- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] TypeScript: No type errors (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Builds successfully (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Specification documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] JSON Schemas updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if this is a user-facing change)

Describe any breaking changes here. None if this is not a breaking change.
